meta.title: Fernanda Rondon — Creative Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Fernanda Rondon, creative developer and designer

about.bio: Full-stack developer with a frontend focus and a background in visual arts. I create thoughtful digital experiences through collaboration, curiosity, and user-centered design. I believe the best products come from working closely with the people behind the ideas.

items.title: Frontend Engineer – Product & Team Collaboration
items.description: Developed key React-based frontend features and optimized workflows, worked closely with design and backend teams, collaborated across disciplines to shape product logic, and progressed into a product engineering lead role.

items.title: Web Developer
items.description: Development of a geolocated visual archive for the HOW DO WE REMEMBER project. Complementing the StoryMaps platform with content creation and interactive map configuration.

items.title: Web Developer
items.description: Developed the Archival Horizons geolocated narrative archive—a digital mapping platform preserving the oral (hi)stories of the ABCSSS islands—using custom WordPress features with JavaScript, PHP.

items.title: Junior Web Developer
items.description: Support and maintenance of existing applications as part of the development team. Handle ticket handling, resolve issues, and collaborate on visual adjustments, functional improvements.

items.title: Archival Horizons
items.description: A semi open source map where the (hi)stories and perspectives of the ABCSSS (Diaspora) are at the center.

items.title: Gato Verde
items.description: Landing page for a holistic wellness brand, featuring service and product catalogs with direct WhatsApp contact for bookings and purchases.

items.title: click-and-draw
items.description: This is a web tool to help you build drawing ideas! by giving you a escene to draw, ( caracther + place + action )

items.title: mxn-to-jpn
items.description: A simple app to help converte MXN to JPN in case your travel to JAPAN! to make more easy keep update of the exchange rates!

items.title: pixel-piano
items.description: This is a fun, interactive virtual piano you can play right in your browser using your computer keyboard!

items.title: tetris-game
items.description: fun nostalgic website to play tetris

contact.description: Looking for a collaborator, a new project, or a creative challenge. Let's build thoughtful digital experiences together.
